label: Legitimacy
description: How accepted and rightful institutions are felt to be.

label: Order
description: How stability, discipline, and governability are maintained.

label: Fracture
description: Moments when cohesion, settlement, or continuity begins to split.

label: Technology
description: The role of tools, systems, and technical acceleration in reshaping life.

label: Labour
description: How work, bargaining power, and material survival are structured.

label: Belief
description: The role of religion, ideology, and moral certainty.

label: Identity
description: The making and contestation of belonging, sovereignty, and collective selfhood.

label: Inequality
description: The concentration of power, wealth, and advantage.

label: Reform
description: Attempts to redesign systems before or after breakdown.

label: Empire
description: External projection, imperial integration, and imperial strain.

label: War
description: The military shaping of society, institutions, and daily life.

label: Information
description: The speed and reach of narrative, persuasion, and communication.
